testcase.name: test_admin_can_create_banquet
testcase.failure: tests/test_permissions_iteration48.py:197: in test_admin_can_create_banquet assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Admin should create banquet: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin should create banquet: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","venue_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Banquet_Admin","city":"Yaoundé","address":"Banquet Hall","capacity_min":50,"capacity_max":500}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","base_price"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Banquet_Admin","city":"Yaoundé","address":"Banquet Hall","capacity_min":50,"capacity_max":500}}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_can_create_package
testcase.failure: tests/test_permissions_iteration48.py:278: in test_admin_can_create_package assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Admin should create package: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin should create package: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","package_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Package_Admin","destination":"Beach Resort","base_price":100000,"duration_days":3}},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","duration_nights"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Package_Admin","destination":"Beach Resort","base_price":100000,"duration_days":3}}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
